name: Tasty Bean Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of salted water to boil and cook the noodles until tender. Drain, rinse under cold water, and set aside in a serving dish.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat. Stir fry onion, broccoli, mushrooms, water chestnuts, and bamboo shoots for 2 minutes. Add bean sprouts and stir fry for an additional minute. Place the vegetables on the same dish with the noodles. Keep warm.
3. Increase heat to medium-high and add ginger and garlic. Cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Stir in salt, brown sugar, soy sauce, dry sherry, and sesame oil. Mix well.
5. Add the cubed bean curd and continue cooking gently until it begins to brown lightly. Stir in the vegetables and noodles.
6. Keep warm while preparing the garnish: heat a little more oil in the same wok, then add sesame seeds, cashew nuts, green onions, and green peppers. Cook for about 1 minute until the nuts are golden brown.
7. Serve immediately with additional garnishes as desired.
